title: Change Working Directory
description: Change the AI tool session's working directory. This affects subsequent relative paths used by filesystem and file-reading tools without changing the backend process directory.

selection.summary: Set the active folder for subsequent relative path tool calls.
selection.whenToUse: Use when the user wants work to continue from a different local folder or when repeated relative path reads/listings should share one base directory.
selection.whenNotToUse: Do not use for editing files or when a one-off absolute path is clearer.
